meta.summary: Offline R/Bioconductor runtime and CLI for GMT-based over-representation analysis, GSEA, plots, tables, and provenance.
meta.description: Offline R/Bioconductor runtime and CLI for GMT-based over-representation analysis, GSEA, plots, tables, and provenance.

test: enrichment-r-run --version | grep -Fx 'enrichment-r 0.1.0' >/dev/null && enrichment-r-run --help | grep -F 'Offline ORA and GSEA runtime' >/dev/null && enrichment-r-versions | grep -F 'clusterProfiler' >/dev/null && Rscript -e "pkgs <- c('clusterProfiler','enrichplot','fgsea','DOSE','AnnotationDbi','GO.db','KEGGREST','GSEABase','ggplot2','jsonlite','data.table'); invisible(lapply(pkgs, library, character.only=TRUE)); stopifnot(as.character(packageVersion('clusterProfiler')) == '4.18.4'); stopifnot(as.character(packageVersion('fgsea')) == '1.36.2')"

tmp=/tmp/taf-enrichment-r-ora-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf 'gene_id
A
B
C
' > gene_list.tsv && printf 'gene_id
A
B
C
D
E
F
G
H
I
J
' > background.tsv && printf 'set_alpha	Alpha pathway	A	B	C	D
set_beta	Beta pathway	E	F	G	H
set_gamma	Gamma pathway	A	E	I	J
' > gene_sets.gmt && enrichment-r-run --gene-list gene_list.tsv --gene-sets gene_sets.gmt --background background.tsv --outdir out --min-size 1 --max-size 20 --top-n 5 && test -s out/ora_results.tsv && test -s out/dotplot.pdf && test -s out/dotplot.png && test -s out/run.manifest.json && grep -F 'set_alpha' out/ora_results.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'ora_result_count' out/enrichment_summary.tsv >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-enrichment-r-gsea-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf 'gene_id	score
A	3
B	2
C	1
D	-1
E	-2
F	-3
G	-4
H	-5
' > ranked_genes.tsv && printf 'set_alpha	Alpha pathway	A	B	C	D
set_beta	Beta pathway	E	F	G	H
set_gamma	Gamma pathway	A	E	I	J
' > gene_sets.gmt && enrichment-r-run --ranked-genes ranked_genes.tsv --gene-sets gene_sets.gmt --outdir out --min-size 1 --max-size 20 --top-n 5 && test -s out/gsea_results.tsv && test -s out/dotplot.pdf && test -s out/dotplot.png && test -s out/versions.tsv && grep -F 'set_beta' out/gsea_results.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'fgsea' out/versions.tsv >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-enrichment-r-combined-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf 'gene_id
A
B
C
' > gene_list.tsv && printf 'gene_id	score
A	3
B	2
C	1
D	-1
E	-2
F	-3
G	-4
H	-5
' > ranked_genes.tsv && printf 'gene_id
A
B
C
D
E
F
G
H
I
J
' > background.tsv && printf 'set_alpha	Alpha pathway	A	B	C	D
set_beta	Beta pathway	E	F	G	H
set_gamma	Gamma pathway	A	E	I	J
' > gene_sets.gmt && enrichment-r-run --gene-list gene_list.tsv --ranked-genes ranked_genes.tsv --gene-sets gene_sets.gmt --background background.tsv --outdir out --min-size 1 --max-size 20 --top-n 5 && test -s out/ora_results.tsv && test -s out/gsea_results.tsv && test -s out/enrichment_summary.tsv && test -s out/run.manifest.json && grep -F 'set_alpha' out/ora_results.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'set_beta' out/gsea_results.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'background_source' out/enrichment_summary.tsv >/dev/null

upstream.name: TAFFISH enrichment-r runtime
upstream.citation: Wu T et al. clusterProfiler 4.0: A universal enrichment tool for interpreting omics data. The Innovation. 2021;2(3):100141. Korotkevich G et al. Fast gene set enrichment analysis.
